description_long: This object is a cylindrical wooden barrel or bucket with vertical wooden staves and prominent black metal bands reinforcing its structure. The bands are fastened with large, round metal rivets, and extend above the rim, forming angular protrusions that give the top a jagged, open appearance. The wood has a natural, medium-brown grain, while the metal bands are matte black, providing a strong visual contrast. The interior appears hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold or contain materials. The overall construction is robust, suitable for outdoor or urban environments where durability is important. There are no visible handles or lids, and the object is open at the top.
description: A sturdy, open-topped wooden barrel or bucket reinforced with black metal bands and rivets, featuring angular metal extensions above the rim.
description_view_0: Front view showing three prominent black metal bands and angular extensions, with visible wood grain panels.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the depth of the bucket and the staggered arrangement of the metal bands and rivets.
description_view_2: Side view with two main metal bands in focus, showing the symmetry and open top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the vertical bands and the open, jagged rim.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: black metal bands with rivets at top, middle, and bottom
